authority: candidate inputs only; does not change frame, guardrails, metrics, thresholds, or action envelope
context_fit_recheck: Use only for OKRA memory-progression work in this repository unless human ratifies broader use.
do_not_assume: Do not assume scored default-dogfood evals passed.
Do not assume semantic memory promotion is approved.
Do not use this continuation packet without freshness and context-fit recheck.
human_ratification_boundary: Human ratification is required before any frame or guardrail change.

review_set.independence_basis: separate review wrapper path from implementation narrative
objections_or_dissent: latest diff review reported remaining issues or dogfood store repair requirements
review_set.verdict: blocked findings present; not promotion approval
